title: Event-Driven Architecture with Message Queue
scenario: Design an event-driven architecture for a real-time analytics system. The system should collect user events, process them in real-time, and store the results in a database. The target LLM output should be a Python code snippet implementing the event-driven architecture.
constraints: Must use a message queue (e.g., RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka) for event processing

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should process events in real-time and handle event failures correctly.
The architecture should integrate with a database for storing results.
The code should be well-structured, readable, and follow best practices.
